name: AI Agent Passport MCP
description: Connect any LLM to the AI Agent Identity Ledger hosted on Render.

claude_desktop._docs: Merge the mcpServers block into ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json on macOS.

langchain._docs: Use MultiServerMCPClient (langchain-mcp-adapters) or langchain-mcp with stdio.

example_python.install: pip install langchain-mcp-adapters mcp httpx python-dotenv

cursor._docs: Add to .cursor/mcp.json in your project or global Cursor MCP settings.

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register a new agent identity passport.

parameters.agent_name: string (required) — display name for the agent

tools.name: verify_agent_passport
tools.description: Check if an agent is active, paid/trial, expired; costs 1 credit.

parameters.agent_id: string (required) — UUID of the agent to verify

tools.name: refill_agent_credits
tools.description: Machine-wallet refill (+5000 credits) after Stripe MPP payment.

parameters.agent_id: string (required) — UUID of the agent to refill
